config.seed_text: A research vessel recovered a transmission from the trench floor. It began as engineering telemetry and slowly turned into philosophy.
config.anchor_a: Describe a machine as an inert object.
config.anchor_b: Describe a machine as if it were a dreaming intelligence.

model.notes: Direct continuation of the current repo's GPT-2 lineage.

records.output_text: One day this data is recorded on an intercom system using satellite video for analysis. After decades spent studying every possible aspect to understand its origin and purpose, we finally get our chance at understanding all that can come about through communications between planets orbiting other stars—not just via radio transmissions or satellites but also indirectly beyond Earth's atmosphere! This time around you will see many interesting details which make up your scientific mission (the first step.) This time around you will see many interesting details which make up your scientific mission (the first step.)
